CONTENT.Personal life: Born in the Netherlands, Teze is of Congolese descent.

CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 4 August 2024As of match played 21 November 2023
CONTENT.Professional career: Teze was first promoted to the PSV senior team in 2019. On 29 May 2022 PSV Eindhoven announced that they had extended Teze's contract through 2025.
CONTENT.International career: He represented Netherlands at the 2016 UEFA European Under-17 Championship and the 2021 UEFA European Under-21 Championship, the Netherlands reached the semi-finals in both of those tournaments.He was called up to the senior Netherlands squad for the friendly matches against Denmark and Germany on 26 and 29 March 2022, respectively. On 8 June 2022, Teze earned his first cap for the Netherlands national team, playing 90 minutes in a 2-1 UEFA Nations League win over Wales.

SUMMARY: Jordan Teze (born 30 September 1999) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a right-back or centre-back for Eredivisie club PSV and the Netherlands national team.
